description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Library builds (shared) that runs on push to specific branches and tags, and on pull requests to certain branches. Use a matrix job strategy to build on windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macOS-latest. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up Python 3.x, install dependencies, extract the CoolProp version, configure CMake, build the project, and archive the shared library artifact.
